title: The Brothers Karamazov
writer: Julius J. Epstein, Fyodor Dostoevsky, Constance Garnett
actors: Yul Brynner, Maria Schell, Claire Bloom
plot: Drama based on Russian writer Fyodor Dostoevsky's homonymous novel about the proud Karamazov family in 1870s Russia.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 2 wins & 7 nominations total
